entity: Shaquille O'Neal inducted into the Basketball Hall of Fame in 2016
notes: Shaquille O'Neal was inducted into the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame in 2016 (his first year of eligibility after retiring in 2011). The induction year is sourced from stg_team_retired (Shaq has 6 rows in stg_team_retired all at 2016, one per team — the query's DISTINCT/LIMIT 1 dedupes). Retired, year is fixed at 2016.
